name: INNOVATIVE SOLUTIONS & SUPPORT INC
business: Innovative Solutions & Support, Inc. (dba Innovative Aerosystems) is a vertically integrated provider of flight solutions and equipment to commercial air transport, general aviation markets, the United States Department of Defense, and allied foreign militaries. The company designs, develops, manufactures, sells, and services avionics products and systems for retrofit applications and Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs). It operates in one business segment focusing on integrated flight deck systems, navigation systems, communication systems, sensors and control systems, and advanced flight actuators.
sellsTo: United States Department of Defense and allied foreign militaries
Retrofit market (aircraft operators, aircraft modification centers)
namedCustomers: United States federal government (including DoD, Department of Interior, Department of Homeland Security)

exposures.sentence: IA is a vertically integrated provider of flight solutions and equipment to commercial air transport, general aviation markets, the United States Department of Defense (DoD) and allied foreign militaries.
The Company markets its products directly to the DoD and to domestic and international defense contractors for end use in military aircraft retrofit programs.

catalysts.event: Completed construction of an additional 40,000 square feet of capacity at Exton facility, expanding total to 85,000 square feet, in quarter ended June 30, 2025.
catalysts.sentence: In the quarter ended June 30, 2025, the Company completed construction of an additional 40,000 square feet of capacity at the Exton facility, expanding it to a total of 85,000 square feet.

catalysts.event: Announced ThrustSense Autothrottle system selection by US Army for C-12 (B200) aircraft in October 2024.
catalysts.sentence: In October 2024, we announced our ThrustSense Autothrottle system was selected by the US Army to be installed on their C-12 (B200) aircraft equipped with ProLine21 avionics suites.

catalysts.event: Received multi-million dollar production contract from a major aerospace company for 19 Multifunction Display (MFD) with Integrated Mission Computer in August 2024.
catalysts.sentence: In August 2024, we received a multi-million dollar production contract from a major aerospace company to supply our 19 Multifunction Display (MFD) with Integrated Mission Computer.
